initiative_actions.name: Scout for Locations
initiative_actions.description: Select a suspected Location — it becomes known.
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Scout for Locations. Select a suspected Location to discover. 2D6 Battlefield Test: 6+ required. +1 if Speed 5"+. Cannot be used in Round 1.

initiative_actions.name: Move Up
initiative_actions.description: Move to any known Location (no character already there), or leave a Location to general battle space.
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Move Up. Move to any known Location (must be unoccupied). Or leave current Location to general battle space. No roll required.

initiative_actions.name: Carry Out Task
initiative_actions.description: Achieve objectives. Must be at correct Location. Character may still fight if engaged later.
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Carry Out Task. Must be at the correct Location. Perform scenario objective action. Character may still fight normally if engaged this round.

initiative_actions.name: Charge
initiative_actions.description: Select random enemy. May engage in immediate Brawl. If D6 > your Speed, enemy fires first at 6" (Cover).
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Charge. Select a random enemy. 2D6 Battlefield Test: 6+ (+1 if Speed 5"+, +1 for special movement). If you pass, you may Brawl. Roll 1D6: if > your Speed, enemy fires at 6" range (Cover) before Brawl.

initiative_actions.name: Optimal Shot
initiative_actions.description: Select random enemy. Fire at chosen range (up to max). Crew fires first. Enemy returns fire if alive.
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Optimal Shot. Select random enemy. 2D6 Battlefield Test: 7+ (-1 for Heavy weapon). Choose range up to weapon max. Crew member fires first; if target survives, they return fire. If enemy fires here, they skip the Firefight phase.

initiative_actions.name: Support
initiative_actions.description: Select a crew member. If they are engaged, the Supporter takes their place. Lasts until Supporter is engaged.
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Support. Select a crew member. If that ally is engaged in combat this round, you take their place instead. Lasts until you are engaged for any reason. Can support multiple allies simultaneously.

initiative_actions.name: Take Cover
initiative_actions.description: All shots by/against this character hit only on natural 6. Lost when using Move Up or engaging in Brawl.
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Take Cover. 2D6 Battlefield Test: 6+ (-1 if at a Location). All shots by and against you hit only on natural 6. Brawl enemies still engage you. Status lost when you Move Up or Brawl.

initiative_actions.name: Keep Distance
initiative_actions.description: Can only be targeted by weapons with range >12". If engaged, both sides limited to >12" weapons only.
initiative_actions.instruction: ACTION: Keep Distance. 2D6 Battlefield Test: 6+ (+1 if Speed 5"+). This round, you can only be targeted by enemies with weapon range >12". If targeted, both sides can only use weapons with range >12".

firefight_rules.selection: Randomly select 3 enemies to fight (4 if 7+ total enemies). Resolve one at a time. Player chooses order.
firefight_rules.ranged_vs_ranged: Both have ranged weapons: Longer range fires first. If tied, crew fires first. Stationary, max range, Cover, max Shots.
firefight_rules.melee_only: One is melee-only: Opponent shoots first at 6" (Cover, no Heavy/Area weapons). If target survives, resolve Brawl. If defender fired, no Melee weapon bonus (Pistol bonus OK).
firefight_rules.melee_and_guns: Enemy has melee + is out-ranged: Enemy chooses Brawl instead. Crew may also choose this. Pistol-only combatants cannot use this rule.
firefight_rules.taking_cover: Character Taking Cover: All shots by/against hit only on natural 6. If enemy has Brawl weapon, they engage in Brawl (no fire). Covering character may use any weapon in Brawl.
firefight_rules.multiple_attacks: A character may fire only once per round. Crew may choose not to fire. Enemies always fire if able.
firefight_rules.ignored_traits: Area and Terrifying weapon traits are ignored in no-minis combat.
firefight_rules.stun: All Stun markers removed at end of round. Stunned characters cannot attempt Brawling.
firefight_rules.support: If targeted character is Supported, the Supporter may take their place. Does not affect Locations.

firefight_instruction:
[b]FIREFIGHT PHASE[/b]
Randomly select 3 enemies (4 if 7+ total). Resolve one at a time (player chooses order).
Each enemy targets a random crew member.

[b]Both Ranged:[/b] Longer range fires first (crew first if tied). Stationary, max range, Cover, max Shots.
[b]One Melee-Only:[/b] Opponent shoots at 6" (Cover) first. Survivor resolves Brawl.
[b]Melee + Guns (out-ranged):[/b] Enemy may choose Brawl instead. Crew can too. Not for Pistol-only.
[b]Taking Cover:[/b] All shots hit only on natural 6. Brawl enemies still engage.
[b]Notes:[/b] Max 1 fire per character/round. Area & Terrifying ignored. Stun clears at round end.

battle_flow_events.instruction: FLOW: Fleeting Shot. A random crew member may immediately shoot a target of your choice. Max weapon range, firer counts as moving (Heavy penalty), target in Cover. No return fire.
FLOW: Running Firefight. Random character from each side fires at each other simultaneously. Range = shortest weapon. Both in Cover, both count as moving. Melee-only cannot fire.
FLOW: Stumble Into Each Other. Random character from each side. Resolve a Brawl immediately.
FLOW: Exposed! A random enemy immediately fires on a random crew member. Max weapon range, stationary shooter, target in Cover. No return fire.
FLOW: Spot Firing Position. Add a known Firing Position Location. A character there counts all ranged targets as being in the open.
FLOW: Find Shortcut. A random crew member may move to any known Location, if desired.
FLOW: Discover Location. If any suspected Locations remain, randomly discover one (it becomes known).
FLOW: Difficult Sight-lines. During the Firefight phase this round, select one FEWER enemy figure.
FLOW: Kill Zone. Roll 1D6+10. ALL gunfire this round takes place at that range (inches). Weapons unable to reach cannot fire.
FLOW: Open Ground. All characters attempting to enter Brawling combat count as being in the open if fired upon.
FLOW: Intense Fight. During the Firefight phase this round, select one MORE enemy figure.
FLOW: Careful Maneuvering. Choose an enemy figure. This figure cannot attack in the Firefight phase this round.
FLOW: Covered Retreat. You may immediately retreat any number of crew members, if desired.
FLOW: Separated. No Brawling combat can be attempted this round. Melee-only enemies will not attack.

morale_rules: MORALE: Enemies take morale tests as normal at end of round. Morale failures remove regular foes first, then Specialists.
retreat_rules: RETREAT: At end of each round, you may retreat up to 2 crew. Roll 1D6 per figure: if roll <= their movement Speed, they escape (as if leaving the battlefield edge). Characters with special movement (Jump Belt, etc.) leave automatically and do not count toward the 2-figure limit.

mission_notes.name: Access
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Access): The console is a suspected Location. Soulless receive +1 bonus to locating it.

mission_notes.name: Acquire
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Acquire): The item is in a suspected Location. Pick up by moving there. Character must exit via Retreat rules. If character becomes casualty, item becomes a new known Location.

mission_notes.name: Deliver
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Deliver): The delivery point is a suspected Location. If the item is dropped, it becomes a new known Location.

mission_notes.name: Eliminate
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Eliminate): The target is not removed due to morale failures unless it is the last enemy on the table.

mission_notes.name: Fight Off
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Fight Off): No additional notes required.

mission_notes.name: Move Through
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Move Through): The exit is a suspected Location. Once known, a crew member who moves there can exit the battlefield, fulfilling the condition.

mission_notes.name: Patrol
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Patrol): Each objective is a suspected Location. Check an objective by moving a crew member there.

mission_notes.name: Protect
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Protect): The VIP is attached to a crew member and always accompanies them. While the crew member is on the field, the VIP cannot be attacked directly. If the crew member is a casualty, the VIP acts as a regular character. The objective is a suspected Location.

mission_notes.name: Secure
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Secure): The center of the battlefield is a suspected Location. Any crew figure at the Location AND not attacked in Brawling combat for 2 consecutive rounds achieves the objective.

mission_notes.name: Search
mission_notes.instruction: MISSION (Search): Assume there are 5 suspected Locations capable of holding the item.

hectic_combat.name: Hectic Combat
hectic_combat.instruction:
HECTIC COMBAT VARIANT (optional):
Allow characters to shoot EACH TIME they are engaged by an enemy.
After the initial exchange, any subsequent attacks by that character
during the same round will hit only on natural 6s.

faster_combat.name: Faster Combat
faster_combat.instruction:
FASTER COMBAT VARIANT (optional):
The first exchange of fire each Firefight phase counts both
combatants as being in the open (no Cover). Subsequent
exchanges assume Cover as normal.
